name: Colossyan
description: Colossyan API for programmable AI avatar videos: list avatars and voices, generate videos from templates or full job descriptors, poll jobs, and retrieve/delete generated videos.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Colossyan API bearer token. API access may require a Colossyan plan with API enabled.

tools.name: list_avatars
tools.description: List Colossyan avatars available to the workspace, including supported inference models and avatar variants.

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List Colossyan voices available to the workspace.

tools.name: generate_from_template
tools.description: Generate a video from a template job saved in the Colossyan editor. Use the template job ID exported from the editor and pass variables matching that template.

templateJobId.description: Template job ID exported from the Colossyan editor.

callbackPayload.description: Optional payload echoed to the callback.

tools.name: create_video_generation_job
tools.description: Generate a video by sending a full Colossyan video-generation-job descriptor JSON. Colossyan recommends extracting this descriptor from the web editor for complex videos.

job.description: Provider-native descriptor fields copied from the Colossyan editor, when needed.

tools.name: get_video_generation_job
tools.description: Retrieve a Colossyan video generation job by ID.

tools.name: delete_video_generation_job
tools.description: Delete a Colossyan video generation job by ID.

tools.name: get_generated_video
tools.description: Retrieve a generated video record, including publicUrl/thumbnailUrl when available.

tools.name: delete_generated_video
tools.description: Delete a generated video by ID.

tools.name: create_avatar
tools.description: Create a custom Colossyan avatar when avatar creation API access is enabled for the workspace.

displayName.description: Name to display for the avatar.

sourceFileUrl.description: URL to the video or image file used to create the avatar.
